steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage first describes islands that became independent nations, then names islands that are still part of the US or France. The blank must signal a direct contrast between these two opposite outcomes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Similarly': signals that the same pattern continues. The second outcome is the opposite of the first, not the same. ✗
  • Choice B — 'For instance': signals an illustration of what came before. The islands mentioned are a contrasting case, not an example of independence. ✗
  • Choice C — 'As a result': signals a consequence. Non-independence is not caused by the independence of other islands. ✗
  • Choice D — 'On the other hand': signals the direct opposite of the preceding claim — exactly the shift from independent to non-independent islands. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
